subject: Gaming
title: Undertale: Subverting Expectations
description: A fast breakdown of Undertale: Subverting Expectations for builders.

hook.text: Toby Fox made a game where you can win by befriending every enemy. Undertale redefined RPG storytelling.

buildup.text: Fox was inspired by Earthbound's quirky humor. He wanted an RPG that questioned why players fight at all.

discovery.text: Undertale remembers your choices permanently. Kill everyone and the game judges you—even in future playthroughs.

twist.text: Fox composed all 101 tracks himself. The soundtrack became iconic, with millions of streams online.

climax.text: Undertale sold millions and built one of gaming's most passionate fan communities.

punchline.text: An RPG that remembers your cruelty. One developer changed the genre.

quiz.question: What makes Undertale's choice system unique?
options: The game permanently remembers your choices across playthroughs
There are only two possible endings
